must_haves: Engineering degree from IIT, BITS, NIT or equivalent
Built something real with an LLM API (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
Ability to build front-ends that are visually appealing
nice_to_haves: Experience with retail or e-commerce domain
Experience with business intelligence and conversational interfaces
hidden_expectations: Must be comfortable working directly with the CEO's office and senior leadership
Should have a strong design sensibility and appreciation for brand aesthetics
Ability to work in a fast-paced, startup-like environment within an established brand
Proactive and able to own projects end-to-end with minimal supervision
Strong communication skills to bridge technical and creative teams
day_one_deliverables: Assess current tech stack and data infrastructure
Identify quick wins for AI integration in customer communication
Propose a roadmap for replacing Microsoft BI with conversational intelligence
Start prototyping a clienteling tool for store teams
disqualifiers: Not fluent in Python or NodeJS
No engineering degree from a top-tier institution
